---
title: "Tutorials"
---

## Day 1 

## Day 2

## Day 3

## Installation

Clonez le dépôt du workshop :

```bash
git clone https://github.com/mon-org/mon-workshop.git
cd mon-workshop
```

Voici le notebook de l'exercice :

<!-- {{< embed notebooks/nb_make_grid.ipynb>}} -->
👉 Télécharger le notebook : [notebook.ipynb](notebooks/nb_make_grid.ipynb)

- [ Day 3 - 01 - parallelization with mpi and with netcdf](pdf/2024/jour3-01-parallelization-mpi-and-netcdf.pdf)
